case_title: EDWARD JETTON VS. CSV HOSPITALITY MANGEMENT LLC

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY JETTON, EDWARD AS TO DEFENDANT CSV HOSPITALITY MANAGEMENT LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-30-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-30-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-30-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY LATRICE RANSOM, ASSISTANT MANAGER. PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF JETTON, EDWARD AS TO DEFENDANT CSV HOSPITALITY MANAGEMENT LLC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SEE SIGNATURE) SERVED JUL-12-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CSV HOSPITALITY MANAGEMENT LLC
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CSV HOSPITALITY MANAGEMENT LLC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-30-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JETTON, EDWARD IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CSV HOSPITALITY MANAGEMENT LLC THE COURT FINDS THAT PLAINTIFF HAS NOT PROVED THAT HIS ROOM WAS INFESTED WITH VERMIN. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
